no_changes_rationale:
status: needs_investigation
reason: >
  This bead is still too large for a safe single-pass implementation at the
  current decomposition depth cap. The required change spans subprocess
  launching, spec expansion/serialization, child progress bridging, stop and
  watchdog signal handling, and a broad set of server tests in
  cli/internal/server/workers*.go. The current code still contains the
  in-process execution path in cli/internal/server/workers.go:689-913, but
  converting it to a ddx work subprocess while preserving MaxCostUSD,
  RequestTimeout, MinPower, MaxPower, OpaquePassthrough, FromRev, and all
  existing worker state transitions needs a dedicated split into smaller child
  beads. Because this bead is already at decomposition depth 3, further split
  is rejected per instructions.
